message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant "ConfigurationClassPostProcessor" as ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
participant "ConfigurationClassParser" as ConfigurationClassParser
participant "ComponentScanAnnotationParser" as ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant "AdviceModeImportSelector" as AdviceModeImportSelector
participant "TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector" as TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant "ConfigurationClass" as ConfigurationClass
participant "ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader" as ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant "AutoProxyRegistrar" as AutoProxyRegistrar
participant "AopConfigUtils" as AopConfigUtils

ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassParser: postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: parse(AnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName)
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)

alt 当前被解析的Class被@ComponentScan标注，进行扫描
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser: @ComponentScan扫描
    ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser: parse(AnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass)
    ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: parse(String className, String beanName)
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)进行解析扫描到的类
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processImports(configClass, sourceClass, getImports(sourceClass), true)
else 不进行扫描,处理带@EnableTransactionManagement的importbean配置类
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: 获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    ConfigurationClassParser -> TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector: selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
    TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector -> AdviceModeImportSelector: selectImports(AdviceMode)
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 进行处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 添加AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类\n(即标记@EnableTransactionManagement的类)\n的importBeanDefinitionRegistrars属性中
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: processConfigurationClass
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
end

ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 解析完配置类
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 加载配置类的配置信息
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitions
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClass: loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClass -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanfactory
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 加载@Bean标记的注册方法
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 处理@ImportResource
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 处理@Import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> AutoProxyRegistrar: registerBeanDefinitions
AutoProxyRegistrar -> AopConfigUtils: 注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
AopConfigUtils -> AopConfigUtils: registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary

@enduml
```
